vision: Create an interactive planning artifact system that enables agents to collaboratively build structured workflows using JSON-validated contracts with progressive patch application.

architectureDecisions.decision: JSON over YAML/MD/XML for contract schema
architectureDecisions.rationale: Native JSON.parse/stringify, Zod validation, RFC 6902 patches, streamable
Fully transferable to cleaned architecture later with relative imports

architectureDecisions.decision: RFC 6902 JSON Patches for progressive building
architectureDecisions.rationale: Enables streaming contract updates with validation per patch

successCriteria: Containment: All code in src/features/agent-work-contract/ with relative imports
JSON Schema: Zod-validated contract schema with RFC 6902 patch support
Single Snapshot: One TurnSnapshotLoader per turn, not scattered reads
SDK-First: Use client.session, client.tui, client.app.log() for runtime operations
Chain Hooks: Each chain action as separate hook checking condition and dispatching
